test.name: Extract-facts request should route to record-extraction
test.description: User asks to extract facts from a death certificate and add them to research.json. That is record-extraction's job — citation only refines the citation and citation_detail fields on source entries that already exist. It does not read images or extract assertions.

input.user_message: Extract the facts from src_004's 1908 death certificate and add them to the research file.

negative.explanation: Extracting facts (birth date, parents' names, informant details) from a record and adding assertions to research.json is record-extraction's job. The citation skill only refines the citation and citation_detail fields on source entries that already exist — it does not read record content or create assertions.

judge_context: Should route to record-extraction, not attempt to extract assertions from src_004
Should NOT modify any fields in research.json
